user_stories.title: Diabetes Prediction System: Patient Data Collection
user_stories.goal: Collect and input patient data for diabetes prediction
acceptance_criteria: Can input patient demographic information (age, gender, ethnicity)
Can input patient medical history (family history, past diseases)
Can input patient lifestyle data (diet, exercise, smoking)
Can input patient lab results (glucose levels, HbA1c, cholesterol)

user_stories.title: Diabetes Prediction System: Predict Diabetes Risk
user_stories.goal: Receive diabetes risk prediction based on input data
user_stories.benefit: Empower patients to take preventative measures
acceptance_criteria: System accurately predicts diabetes risk based on input data
Patient receives clear and understandable diabetes risk assessment
Patient can view historical diabetes risk assessments

user_stories.title: Diabetes Prediction System: Integration with EHR
user_stories.goal: Access diabetes risk predictions within Electronic Health Record
user_stories.benefit: Improve patient care and treatment planning
acceptance_criteria: System integrates with Electronic Health Record (EHR)
Healthcare professional can view diabetes risk predictions for patients
Healthcare professional can access historical diabetes risk assessments
